# Underscore-prefixed features are internal and excluded from the
# all-features section.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes together with the code.

pub zensim_gpu::Error::DimensionMismatch::got: usize

pub zensim_gpu::Error::TooBigForFull
pub zensim_gpu::Error::TooBigForFull::cap: usize
pub zensim_gpu::Error::TooBigForFull::needed: usize

pub enum zensim_gpu::MemoryMode
pub zensim_gpu::MemoryMode::Auto
pub zensim_gpu::MemoryMode::Full
pub zensim_gpu::MemoryMode::Strip
pub zensim_gpu::MemoryMode::Strip::h_body: core::option::Option<u32>
pub zensim_gpu::MemoryMode::Tile
pub zensim_gpu::MemoryMode::Tile::h: u32
pub zensim_gpu::MemoryMode::Tile::w: u32
impl core::clone::Clone for zensim_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode
pub fn zensim_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode::clone(&self) -> zensim_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode
impl core::cmp::Eq for zensim_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode
impl core::cmp::PartialEq for zensim_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode

pub enum zensim_gpu::ZensimFeatureRegime

pub zensim_gpu::ZensimFeatureRegime::Extended

pub const fn zensim_gpu::ZensimFeatureRegime::needs_iw(self) -> bool
pub const fn zensim_gpu::ZensimFeatureRegime::needs_masked(self) -> bool

pub struct zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque
impl zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque::clear_reference(&mut self)
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque::compute_features_pixels(&mut self, zenpixels::buffer::PixelSlice<'_>, zenpixels::buffer::PixelSlice<'_>) -> zensim_gpu::Result<[f64; 228]>
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque::compute_features_srgb_u8(&mut self, &[u8], &[u8]) -> zensim_gpu::Result<[f64; 228]>
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque::compute_features_vec_pixels(&mut self, zenpixels::buffer::PixelSlice<'_>, zenpixels::buffer::PixelSlice<'_>) -> zensim_gpu::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<f64>>
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque::compute_features_vec_srgb_u8(&mut self, &[u8], &[u8]) -> zensim_gpu::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<f64>>
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque::compute_features_with_reference_pixels(&mut self, zenpixels::buffer::PixelSlice<'_>) -> zensim_gpu::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<f64>>
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque::compute_features_with_reference_srgb_u8(&mut self, &[u8]) -> zensim_gpu::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<f64>>
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque::compute_pixels(&mut self, zenpixels::buffer::PixelSlice<'_>, zenpixels::buffer::PixelSlice<'_>) -> zensim_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque::compute_srgb_u8(&mut self, &[u8], &[u8]) -> zensim_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque::compute_srgb_u8_with_codec(&mut self, &[u8], &[u8], core::option::Option<&str>) -> zensim_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque::compute_srgb_u8_with_features(&mut self, &[u8], &[u8]) -> zensim_gpu::Result<(zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score, alloc::vec::Vec<f64>)>
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque::compute_with_reference_srgb_u8(&mut self, &[u8]) -> zensim_gpu::Result<zenmetrics_gpu_core::Score>
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque::dims(&self) -> (u32, u32)
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque::has_reference(&self) -> bool
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque::new(zenmetrics_gpu_core::Backend, u32, u32, zensim_gpu::ZensimParams) -> zensim_gpu::Result<Self>
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque::new_with_memory_mode(zenmetrics_gpu_core::Backend, u32, u32, zensim_gpu::ZensimParams, zensim_gpu::memory_mode::MemoryMode) -> zensim_gpu::Result<Self>
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque::regime(&self) -> zensim_gpu::ZensimFeatureRegime
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque::score_from_linear_interleaved(&mut self, &[f32], &[f32]) -> zensim_gpu::Result<f32>
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque::score_from_linear_planes(&mut self, &[f32], &[f32], &[f32], &[f32], &[f32], &[f32]) -> zensim_gpu::Result<f32>
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque::score_from_linear_planes_with_diffmap(&mut self, &[f32], &[f32], &[f32], &[f32], &[f32], &[f32], &mut alloc::vec::Vec<f32>) -> zensim_gpu::Result<f32>
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque::score_from_linear_planes_with_warm_ref(&mut self, &[f32], &[f32], &[f32]) -> zensim_gpu::Result<f32>
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque::score_from_linear_planes_with_warm_ref_diffmap(&mut self, &[f32], &[f32], &[f32], &mut alloc::vec::Vec<f32>) -> zensim_gpu::Result<f32>
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque::score_with_diffmap(&mut self, &[u8], &[u8], &mut alloc::vec::Vec<f32>) -> zensim_gpu::Result<f32>
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque::score_with_warm_ref_diffmap(&mut self, &[u8], &mut alloc::vec::Vec<f32>) -> zensim_gpu::Result<f32>
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque::set_reference_pixels(&mut self, zenpixels::buffer::PixelSlice<'_>) -> zensim_gpu::Result<()>
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque::set_reference_srgb_u8(&mut self, &[u8]) -> zensim_gpu::Result<()>
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque::warm_reference_from_linear_planes(&mut self, &[f32], &[f32], &[f32]) -> zensim_gpu::Result<()>
impl core::marker::Freeze for zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque
impl core::marker::Send for zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque
impl !core::marker::Sync for zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque
impl core::marker::Unpin for zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque

impl !core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zensim_gpu::ZensimOpaque
#[non_exhaustive] pub struct zensim_gpu::ZensimParams
pub zensim_gpu::ZensimParams::profile: core::option::Option<zensim::profile::ZensimProfile>
pub zensim_gpu::ZensimParams::regime: zensim_gpu::ZensimFeatureRegime
pub zensim_gpu::ZensimParams::weights: core::option::Option<alloc::boxed::Box<[f64; 228]>>
impl zensim_gpu::ZensimParams
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimParams::default_weights() -> Self
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimParams::new() -> Self
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimParams::with_canonical_v0_2() -> Self
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimParams::with_profile(self, zensim::profile::ZensimProfile) -> Self
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimParams::with_regime(self, zensim_gpu::ZensimFeatureRegime) -> Self
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimParams::with_weights(self, [f64; 228]) -> Self
impl core::clone::Clone for zensim_gpu::ZensimParams
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimParams::clone(&self) -> zensim_gpu::ZensimParams
impl core::default::Default for zensim_gpu::ZensimParams
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimParams::default() -> Self
impl core::fmt::Debug for zensim_gpu::ZensimParams
pub fn zensim_gpu::ZensimParams::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::marker::Freeze for zensim_gpu::ZensimParams
impl core::marker::Send for zensim_gpu::ZensimParams
impl core::marker::Sync for zensim_gpu::ZensimParams
impl core::marker::Unpin for zensim_gpu::ZensimParams
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zensim_gpu::ZensimParams
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zensim_gpu::ZensimParams
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zensim_gpu::ZensimParams
pub const zensim_gpu::BLUR_RADIUS: u32
pub const zensim_gpu::FEATURES_PER_CHANNEL: usize
pub const zensim_gpu::FEATURES_PER_CHANNEL_BASIC: usize
pub const zensim_gpu::FEATURES_PER_CHANNEL_IW: usize
pub const zensim_gpu::FEATURES_PER_CHANNEL_MASKED: usize
pub const zensim_gpu::FEATURES_PER_CHANNEL_PEAKS: usize
pub const zensim_gpu::FEATURES_PER_SCALE: usize

pub const zensim_gpu::TOTAL_FEATURES: usize
pub const zensim_gpu::TOTAL_FEATURES_EXTENDED: usize
pub const zensim_gpu::TOTAL_FEATURES_WITH_IW: usize
pub static zensim_gpu::WEIGHTS_PREVIEW_V0_2: [f64; 228]
pub fn zensim_gpu::estimate_gpu_memory_bytes(u32, u32, zensim_gpu::ZensimFeatureRegime) -> usize
pub fn zensim_gpu::estimate_strip_gpu_memory_bytes(u32, u32) -> core::option::Option<usize>
pub fn zensim_gpu::score_from_features(&[f64], &[f64]) -> f64
pub fn zensim_gpu::simd_padded_width(usize) -> usize
pub fn zensim_gpu::vram_cap_bytes() -> usize
pub type zensim_gpu::Result<T> = core::result::Result<T, zensim_gpu::Error>
